case_title: ADOLFO D MAGANA VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUNI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. 506 PLAINTIFF ADOLFO MAGANA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER VICTOR MARTINEZ #300740. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAGANA, ADOLFO D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNI $6,928.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,003.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR FOLLOWING SERVICE AT THE MAYOR'S OFFICE. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT THE MUNI BUS OPERATOR NEGLIGENTLY COLLIDED WITH PLAINTIFF CAR AND IS RESPONSIBLE FOR DAMAGES. APART FROM TO BE PAID BY LYFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
